name: Pierogi Fillings, Meat
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, cook the ground beef and pork over medium heat until just cooked through, stirring occasionally.
2. Drain excess fat from the meat mixture.
3. Add 1/3 of the butter to the skillet and sauté the onions until translucent and clear in color.
4. Combine the onion mixture with the remaining meat, seasonings, mushrooms (if using), and sour cream (if using). Mix gently until all ingredients are well incorporated.
5. Allow the filling to cool completely before using it to stuff pierogies.
